---
title: "(alpha) Influenza Clade Explorer"
author: "Elgin Akin"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script>
---

::: {.app-container}

::: {.sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-header}
## Influenza Clade Nomenclature Explorer

<span class="alpha-badge">ALPHA</span>

**Author:** [Elgin Akin](https://elginakin.github.io)

**Data Source:** [Influenza Clade Nomenclature](https://github.com/influenza-clade-nomenclature)

<div class="info-note">
Currently only HA subclade nomenclature is supported.
</div>
:::

::: {.help-section}
<button id="help-button" class="help-button-sidebar">
  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle>
    <path d="M9.09 9a3 3 0 0 1 5.83 1c0 2-3 3-3 3"></path>
    <line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"></line>
  </svg>
  Help & Instructions
</button>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Lineage
<select id="lineage-select" class="form-control">
<option value="H3N2">H3N2</option>
<option value="H1N1">H1N1pdm</option>
<option value="Victoria">B/Victoria</option>
</select>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Filter
<select id="clade-filter" class="form-control">
<option value="">All clades</option>
</select>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Search
<input type="text" id="search-input" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., C.3">
<div id="search-results" class="search-results"></div>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Display Options
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-labels" checked> Show labels
</label>
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-legend"> Show color legend
</label>
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-table"> Show data table
</label>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Appearance
<label>
Label Size: <span id="label-size-value" class="slider-value">11px</span>
</label>
<input type="range" id="label-size" min="8" max="30" value="11" step="1">

<label style="margin-top: 8px; display: block;">
Edge Length: <span id="edge-length-value" class="slider-value">80px</span>
</label>
<input type="range" id="edge-length" min="40" max="150" value="80" step="5">

<label style="margin-top: 8px; display: block;">
Vertical Spacing: <span id="vertical-spacing-value" class="slider-value">20px</span>
</label>
<input type="range" id="vertical-spacing" min="12" max="150" value="20" step="1">

<label style="margin-top: 8px; display: block;">
Node Size: <span id="node-size-value" class="slider-value">5px</span>
</label>
<input type="range" id="node-size" min="3" max="20" value="5" step="1">

<label style="margin-top: 8px; display: block;">
Mutation Font: <span id="mutation-font-value" class="slider-value">7px</span>
</label>
<input type="range" id="mutation-font" min="5" max="30" value="7" step="0.5">
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Selection
<button id="clear-selection" class="btn-clear" disabled>Clear Selection</button>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
<div id="stats-box" class="stats-box">
<span id="node-count">Loading...</span>
</div>
<button id="refresh-data" class="btn-refresh">🔄 Refresh Data</button>
:::

:::
<!-- END .sidebar -->

::: {.main-content}

::: {.main-header}
# [Influenza H3N2 Clade Hierarchy]{#main-title}
:::

<div id="color-legend" class="color-legend"></div>

::: {.content-area}

::: {.viz-panel}
::: {.viz-container #viz-container}
<div id="loading" class="loading">
<div class="spinner"></div>
<p>Loading clade data...</p>
</div>
<svg id="tree-svg"></svg>
:::
:::
<!-- END .viz-panel -->

::: {.inspector-panel #inspector-panel}
::: {.inspector-header}
### 🔍 Clade Inspector
:::
::: {.inspector-content #inspector-content}
<div class="inspector-placeholder">
<p>Click on a clade node to view details</p>
<p class="hint">Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple clades</p>
</div>
:::
:::
<!-- END .inspector-panel -->

:::
<!-- END .content-area -->

::: {.table-panel #table-panel}
::: {.table-header}
<h3>📊 Clade Data Table</h3>
<div class="table-actions">
<input type="text" id="table-search" class="form-control table-search" placeholder="Filter table...">
<button id="download-csv" class="btn-download">Download CSV</button>
</div>
:::
::: {.table-container}
<table id="data-table" class="data-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th data-sort="clade">Clade ↕</th>
<th data-sort="parent">Parent ↕</th>
<th data-sort="alias">Alias ↕</th>
<th data-sort="mutations">Defining Mutations</th>
<th data-sort="mutCount"># Mut ↕</th>
<th data-sort="repCount"># Rep ↕</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody id="table-body">
</tbody>
</table>
:::
:::
<!-- END .table-panel -->

:::
<!-- END .main-content -->

:::
<!-- END .app-container -->

```{=html}
<div id="help-overlay" class="help-overlay">
  <div class="help-modal">
    <button id="close-help" class="close-help">&times;</button>
    
    <div class="help-content">
      <h2>Data</h2>
      <div class="help-section info-box">
        <h3>📊 Data Source</h3>
        <p>This tool visualizes influenza clade nomenclature from the <a href="https://github.com/influenza-clade-nomenclature" target="_blank">Influenza Clade Nomenclature</a> GitHub repository.</p>
        <p><strong>Current Status:</strong> Only HA subclade nomenclature is supported (H3N2, H1N1pdm, B/Victoria).</p>
        <p><strong>Updates:</strong> Data is fetched from GitHub on each session. Use the "Refresh Data" button to get the latest nomenclature.</p>
      </div>

    <div class="help-content">
      <h2>How to Use</h2>
      
      <div class="help-section">
        <h3>Navigation</h3>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Click nodes</strong> to view clade details in the inspector panel</li>
          <li><strong>Ctrl/Cmd + Click</strong> to select multiple clades</li>
          <li><strong>Scroll or drag</strong> to pan around the tree</li>
          <li><strong>Scroll wheel</strong> to zoom in/out</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      
      <div class="help-section">
        <h3>Customization</h3>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Label Size:</strong> Adjust text size for clade names</li>
          <li><strong>Edge Length:</strong> Control horizontal spacing between nodes</li>
          <li><strong>Vertical Spacing:</strong> Adjust spacing between clades (increase to prevent overlap)</li>
          <li><strong>Mutation Font:</strong> Change size of mutation labels on edges</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      
      <div class="help-section">
        <h3>Search & Filter</h3>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Search:</strong> Type a clade name (e.g., "C.3") to highlight it</li>
          <li><strong>Filter:</strong> Show only descendants of a specific clade</li>
          <li><strong>Table:</strong> Enable to see sortable, filterable data</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      

      
      <div class="help-section">
        <h3>💡 Tips</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Increase <strong>Vertical Spacing</strong> to 40-50px if mutation labels overlap</li>
          <li>Use the <strong>Clear Selection</strong> button to deselect all nodes</li>
          <li>Download the data table as CSV for further analysis</li>
          <li>The color legend shows major clade groups</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

```

<div id="tooltip" class="tooltip"></div>

::: {.app-footer}
<span class="version-badge">v1.0.0</span> | Clade assignments sourced from the [Influenza Clade Nomenclature](https://github.com/influenza-clade-nomenclature) Github Repository | Built with Quarto & D3.js 
:::

```{=html}
<script type="module" src="clade-tree.js"></script>
```
